## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m pytest backend/tests -q` and `cd frontend && npm run test && npm run build`)
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (`ruff check backend` / `ruff format backend`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, `.env.example`, API docs if applicable)
- [ ] New environment variables documented in `.env.example` and README
- [ ] Security implications considered (no secrets committed, no new attack surfaces)
- [ ] Backward compatibility preserved where applicable
